hero.alt: A beautiful portrait of a Tasmanian Devil in the wild
hero.caption: The Tasmanian Devil is a highly adapted species with unique behaviors.

habitat.alt: A Tasmanian Devil navigating its natural environment
habitat.caption: They make their home in diverse habitats where they can find shelter and thrive.

diet.alt: A Tasmanian Devil finding or consuming food
diet.caption: Finding food is a major part of the daily routine for a Tasmanian Devil.

baby.alt: A young or baby Tasmanian Devil showing early development
baby.caption: Baby Tasmanian Devils must learn to survive and adapt from a young age.

family.fileTitle: File:Healesville Sarcophilus harrisii in Healesville Sanctuary 02.jpg
family.alt: A group of Tasmanian Devils interacting with each other
family.caption: While often solitary, some Tasmanian Devils interact with others of their species.

range.fileTitle: File:Healesville Sarcophilus harrisii in Healesville Sanctuary 03.jpg
range.alt: A Tasmanian Devil traveling across its geographic range
range.caption: Their geographic range covers various regions suited to their survival.

size.fileTitle: File:Healesville Sarcophilus harrisii in Healesville Sanctuary 01.jpg
size.alt: A photo showing the size of a Tasmanian Devil
size.caption: The size of a Tasmanian Devil can vary depending on its age and environment.

closeup.alt: A detailed close-up showing the physical features of a Tasmanian Devil
closeup.caption: A close-up view reveals the intricate details of a Tasmanian Devil's body.

fun-fact.alt: A Tasmanian Devil showing a unique behavior or adaptation
fun-fact.caption: Did you know that the Tasmanian Devil has amazing features that help it survive?
